recommendations.title: Mystic River
recommendations.overview: The lives of three men who were childhood friends are shattered when one of them suffers a family tragedy.

recommendations.title: Flowers in the Attic
recommendations.overview: After the sudden death of their father, four children face cruel treatment from their ruthless grandmother.

recommendations.title: The Dead Girl
recommendations.overview: The clues to a young woman's death come together as the lives of seemingly unrelated women begin to intersect.

recommendations.title: Voice from the Stone
recommendations.overview: Verena is a nurse who arrives at an old mansion in Italy to help a young boy who has fallen silent since the sudden passing of his mother.

recommendations.title: The Girl in the Fog
recommendations.overview: A gripping and chilling thriller that brings us to a hazy mountain village where an enigmatic detective is investigating the sudden disappearance of fifteen-year-old girl.

recommendations.title: The Sixth Sense
recommendations.overview: Following an unexpected tragedy, child psychologist Malcolm Crowe meets a nine year old boy named Cole Sear, who is hiding a dark secret.

recommendations.title: Overdrive
recommendations.overview: Master car thieves square off against French gangsters in the South of France with money, women and lives all on the line.

recommendations.title: Where the Truth Lies
recommendations.overview: An ambitious reporter probes the reasons behind the sudden split of a 1950s comedy team.

recommendations.title: Black Coal, Thin Ice
recommendations.overview: Two former cops start investigating the series of murders that tanked their careers when the killings begin again.

recommendations.title: After
